{{Infobox character
| name = Boez
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Boez]] had extra pins.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Boez]] was being dragged away by [[Malachi]]’s soldiers.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Boez]] screamed.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Boez]] was hanging in the air with branches wrapped around his wrists and ankles.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
